description:
Specification

Product Information

Item Code:W2225P173809

Product Type:General Item

Product Name:PawHut Dog Ramp for Bed, Pet Ramp for Dogs with Non-Slip Carpet and Top Platform, 74" x 16" x 25", Brown

Main Color:Brown

Main Material:Wood

Product Dimensions

Assembled Length (in.):74.00

Assembled Width (in.):16.00

Assembled Height (in.):25.00

Weight (lbs.):26.40

Package Size

Length (in.):34.75

Width (in.):20.50

Height (in.):7.25

Weight (lbs.):30.80

Product Features

  • Easy Top Platform: Featuring a low slope that leads up to a flat surface, this dog and cat ramp is made for a super easy walk-up that provides a place to stop before making the move to another surface. Offer your pet an easier time getting up to where you are or where they're going.
  • Anti-Slip Carpet: The anti-slip surface prevents difficulty using the ramp, making each step secure and stable for safety. The surface is carpet for a nicer look.
  • High-Quality Materials: Materials matter more than they're given credit for. Made from strong and durable pine wood, this cat or dog ramp is high-quality, ensuring strength for heavy use week after week.
  • Benefit Design: This wooden pet ramp can quickly help your dog reach higher places without getting injured while reducing strain on joints and muscles.
  • Cat and Puppy Ramp Information: Overall Dimensions: 74" L x 16" W x 25" H
    Ramp Dimensions: 73" L x 15.75" W
    Platform Dimensions: 15.75" L x 11.75" W. Assembly required.
